findings.claim_text: Broadcom's fiscal Q2 2026 AI semiconductor revenue was $10.8B (+143% YoY) and Q2 AI bookings exceeded $30B against $10.8B shipped (book-to-bill >2.8x).
Broadcom, Apollo, and Blackstone announced the 'AI XPV Platform' to finance up to 20GW of Anthropic's Broadcom XPU purchases, first tranche ~$35B for ~1GW, 20GW target by 2028.
Anthropic filed a confidential IPO S-1 on June 1, 2026 at ~$965B valuation after a ~$65B Series H, with Bloomberg reporting ~$47B annualized revenue run rate.
